0:
The ryu metsuke seeks the aid of a kindly adventurer.

※This quest is available for a limited time only.

The ryu metsuke seeks the aid of a kindly adventurer.

※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
The ryu metsuke is pleased to inform you that this year's Heavensturn celebration, which sees the draconic ryu honored in the Far East, is underway. However, he is <Emphasis>not</Emphasis> so pleased to inform you that their mascots─chocobo chicks dressed in ryu costumes─are struggling to win over the locals. Wishing to discover the cause of the cold reception, the metsuke bids you assist his delegation's leader, the ryu bugyo, who can be found at the edge of the Aftcastle with her feathered friend.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
